parsed.production_notes: The visuals consist of static, AI-generated illustrations exhibiting characteristic uncanny smoothness and unnatural lighting. The voiceover utilizes synthetic text-to-speech, and the pointing hand is a digitally overlaid stock asset moving mechanically.

characters.appearance: Young woman with a pale complexion and dark hair pulled back neatly. She has wide, expressive eyes.
characters.wardrobe: Black Victorian-style dress with a high white collar.

characters.appearance: Young boy with a pale complexion and light brown hair.
Adult woman, features obscured by distance and shadow.

scenes.setting: A dimly lit room at night, illuminated only by a single candle, casting large shadows on the wall.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A and Character B stand close together in a dark room. Character A holds a lit candle in a brass holder, illuminating their faces. Both characters are looking off-screen to the left with expressions of terror. Character B is extending his arm, pointing in the direction they are looking. Their shadows are cast starkly against the wall behind them.
A disembodied human hand with the index finger extended in a pointing gesture moves across a plain white background.

scenes.visual_description: The screen is split horizontally. The top half displays an illustration of a frightened woman and child holding a candle in a dark room. The bottom half shows a white background where a disembodied hand points to various locations. A banner is visible at the very top of the screen.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker 1 says: Miss Jessel — she's there! She's there! She's there!
scenes.on_screen_text:
GUÁRDALO EN SECRETO HASTA QUE LO CONSIGAS: SOLO 10 MINUTOS PARA HABLAR INGLÉS CON FLUIDEZ
"Miss Jessel — she's there! She's there! She's there!"

scenes.setting: Exterior of a large, gothic mansion at night under a cloudy, dark sky.

panels.panel_visual_description: A large, imposing gothic mansion stands against a dark, cloudy night sky. The architecture is detailed with pointed roofs and dark windows. Character C stands motionless on the stone steps leading up to the mansion's entrance. The overall lighting is dark and moody, emphasizing the eerie atmosphere.
A disembodied human hand with the index finger extended in a pointing gesture moves across a plain white background.

scenes.visual_description: The top half of the split screen shows an illustration of a dark gothic mansion with a figure standing on the steps. The bottom half continues to show a white background with the disembodied pointing hand. Throughout the scene, text and interactive dictionary pop-ups appear in the bottom half, which the hand interacts with.

scenes.on_screen_text:
HENRY JAMES OTRA VUELTA DE TUERCA
The governess stood frozen, staring across the quiet room. The child's voice filled the house with fear. Something unseen seemed to watch them from the shadows. And in that moment, the old mansion felt colder than ever.
governess (institutriz)
to stare (mirar fijamente)
fear (miedo)
to watch (observar)
to feel (sentir)
